title: Doctor consistency repairer + meta_manually_diverged check
description: Per D22: doctor role changes from 'baseline promoter' (writes baseline_synced) to 'consistency repairer' (writes meta_reconciled). doctor --fix calls reconcileRules(projectRoot) instead of the old promote-baseline path. NEW check meta_manually_diverged detects when user hand-edited agents.meta.json in ways that diverge from filesystem (D24).
scope: Layer 2 P0 — R28 consumer at doctor

files.change: doctor --fix path: replace old baseline-promotion logic with reconcileRules(projectRoot) call from rule-sync. Old `baseline_synced` ledger event renamed to `meta_reconciled` (with backward-compat ledger replay handling for old events)
NEW check `meta_manually_diverged`: compare meta nodes against filesystem; emit when meta has nodes not backed by .md files OR fields that don't match revision-hash
Add tests for new check; backward-compat test for ledger replay with old baseline_synced events

criteria: doctor --fix calls reconcileRules; meta_reconciled event written
Old baseline_synced events still parse during ledger replay (backward compat)
meta_manually_diverged check detects user hand-edits to agents.meta.json
